reason: The former v8 model contained eight final-angle answer offsets and pulled arbitrary specimens toward the professional standard. All offsets and orientation-classifier data were intentionally removed.
required_action: Recapture one standard bar in an image-geometrically stable camera state: 10 unturned HOBJ in head_to_tail with device-row-min at physical R, then physically turn the same bar 180 degrees about institution A/D and capture 10 HOBJ in tail_to_head. Regenerate v12 and require blind turnover equivariance. Never reinterpret these groups as reverse scanner travel or restore angle_offsets_deg, orientation_models, or orientation_detector.
